summary: DVLT remains the book's biggest risk: on top of the $1B shelf/new Maxim ATM/$2B structured-financing term sheet, it also carries an unresolved binding LOI to acquire CyberCatch for ~49.9M newly issued shares (~7.5% of pro forma equity) whose 45-day exclusivity window quietly lapsed mid-June with no definitive agreement announced since - a serial diluter with too many live and stalled stock-issuance threads at once.

UUUU.note: $300M shelf + active ATM; issued 3.04M shares for $54.4M in Q1 2026 (244.4M shares out, ~+20% YoY) — real ongoing dilution, though funded by solid uranium fundamentals and the Vacuumschmelze deal, not distress. No change this cycle.

DVLT.note: Serial diluter (855.6M shares out, dilution ~52% per current data); $1B S-3 effective 3/25/26, $60M offering closed 5/5/26, Maxim ATM signed June 2026, non-binding $2B structured-financing term sheet (6/1/26) that could cede board control, AND a binding LOI (5/1/26) to acquire CyberCatch Holdings for ~49.9M new shares whose 45-day exclusivity period expired ~6/15/26 with no definitive agreement confirmed since — status unclear (live, lapsed, or being renegotiated). Already on the bot's own avoid list; entry catalyst (meme-coin/tokenization/stablecoin JV hype) has no fundamental support.

CAI.note: IPO lockup already passed without incident; $100M buyback authorized (anti-dilutive), no new secondary or shelf activity found. No change this cycle.

AVO.note: Calavo Growers acquisition is REAL and near closing: HSR cleared 4/17/26, Calavo shareholders approved 4/28/26, Mexican antitrust cleared, guidance targets closing in the fiscal quarter ending 7/31/26 — imminent within days to weeks, not a distant event. AVO will issue ~0.979 new shares per Calavo share; mechanical dilution lands very soon. Contradicts intel.json's dismissal of this as search-engine noise.

NTSK.note: Ticker ambiguity resolved: held position matches Netskope Inc (NASDAQ:NTSK), a $5B cybersecurity company, not NetSol (NTWK) — fundamentally sound but off the small-cap thesis this bot is built around. No change this cycle.

flags.why: Serapha Bio reverse merger confirmed (announced 6/22/26): pro forma existing BOLD holders retain only ~3.7% of the combined company, own oncology pipeline halted, 75% workforce cut, reverse split + authorized-share increase required to close. The +61.7% premarket pop is a classic 'sell the news' distressed reverse-merger dynamic, not a buyable catalyst. No update found today.

Top radar candidate (5.93) but carries an active $100M ATM sales agreement since 2024 plus a Feb-2026 $100M underwritten offering (20M shares at $5) that is now underwater (stock $3.75) — dilution is live, not hypothetical. No new filing found this cycle.

Automatic S-3ASR shelf effective 1/13/26 already used twice via 424B5, plus an active $50M ATM program — ongoing drip-dilution setup. Currently below buy threshold (3.33) so moot for now, but flag if score rises.

dilution_watch.note: Non-binding term sheet for up to $2.0B structured financing in four $500M tranches at $1.55-2.00/share; full draw implies >50% dilution and board-control shift to counterparty.
New Maxim Group co-sales-agent ATM agreement signed; Maxim also received 2.73M warrants at $0.6325 strike — fresh drip-dilution mechanism on top of the $1B shelf.

Binding LOI to acquire CyberCatch Holdings for ~49.9M newly issued DVLT shares (~7.5% pro forma equity) at CAD $5.11/CyberCatch share; 45-day exclusivity to negotiate a definitive agreement expired ~6/15/26 with no confirmed definitive agreement since — status unresolved, watch for either a lapse announcement or a signed deal.
$100M underwritten offering, 20M shares at $5.00; stock now trades below that price at $3.75. $100M ATM sales agreement (since 2024) remains active.
Merger agreement with Serapha Bio; reverse split + authorized-share increase required to close; existing holders diluted to ~3.7% pro forma.
Automatic shelf effective, used twice via 424B5; $50M ATM program active to fund natural-gas expansion.
3.04M shares issued for $54.4M under existing $300M shelf; share count 244.4M, up ~20% YoY.
S-4 for Calavo Growers acquisition; new AVO shares (0.979/Calavo share) to be issued at closing, now imminent (target: fiscal quarter ending 7/31/26).

disagreements: intel.json dismissed the Mission Produce/Calavo Growers acquisition as a 'recurring search-engine mixup' with no primary-source confirmation — it is a real, nearly-closed deal (all approvals/clearances obtained, targeted to close by 7/31/26). Treat the pending share issuance as imminent, not noise.

intel.json carries no alert on DVLT this snapshot despite it being a held position with an active new ATM, a pending $2B financing that could cede board control, AND an unresolved CyberCatch acquisition LOI (49.9M new shares) whose exclusivity period lapsed without a public update — this deserves an active warning every cycle it remains held.
intel.json flags NTSK as an unresolved 'ticker ambiguity' — the held position resolves to Netskope (NASDAQ:NTSK), a $5B cybersecurity company, fundamentally sound but off the small-cap thesis.
